strategy_0.name: Baseline
strategy_0.description: No transformations applied. Raw input data with baseline assumptions.

strategy_1.name: Unconditional NDC
strategy_1.description: Libya unconditional NDC commitments: gas flaring recovery, electricity demand efficiency, power generation efficiency, cement energy, transport efficiency, and partial tree planting (~10% of 100M tree target).

transformers.notes: Gas flaring recovery: reduce fugitive leaks from oil/gas operations. Libya's NDC targets flaring reduction from petroleum sector.
Gas flaring recovery complement: maximize flaring of otherwise vented gas as transition measure, reducing raw CH4 venting.
Electricity demand efficiency: improve appliance efficiency in buildings (residential and commercial/municipal).
Power generation efficiency: reduce transmission losses by upgrading electrical infrastructure.
Cement energy efficiency: maximize industrial energy efficiency; applied to cement and iron/steel industries in unconditional scenario.
Transport energy efficiency: increase non-electric vehicle efficiency (dominant mode in Libya).
Partial tree planting: unconditional portion ~10M trees out of 100M target. Scalar 0.1 applied to full reforestation transformation magnitude.

strategy_2.name: Conditional NDC
strategy_2.description: Libya conditional NDC commitments (requires international support): all of Strategy 1 PLUS full renewables deployment, HFC reduction, full tree planting (100M trees), iron & steel efficiency, thermal demand reduction, solid waste, wastewater, and agriculture interventions.

transformers.notes: Gas flaring recovery: reduce fugitive leaks from oil/gas operations.
Gas flaring recovery complement: maximize flaring of vented gas.
Full tree planting: 100M trees target. Full magnitude of reforestation transformer.
Electricity demand efficiency: improve appliance efficiency in buildings.
Thermal energy demand reduction: reduce heat demand in buildings by improving building shell.
Power generation efficiency: reduce transmission losses.
Renewables in power generation: target 95% renewable electricity by final time period.
Cement processes: reduce clinker ratio in cement production (process emissions).
Cement energy: maximize industrial energy efficiency for cement sector.
Iron & steel: maximize industrial production efficiency (kJ/tonne improvements).
HFCs: reduce HFC emission factors; covers refrigerant phase-down per Kigali Amendment.
Solid waste: increase recycling fraction to reduce landfill CH4.
Solid waste: increase biogas capture at landfills and anaerobic digesters.
Wastewater: improved urban wastewater treatment pathways.
Wastewater: increase biogas capture at anaerobic wastewater treatment facilities.
Agriculture: reduce enteric fermentation emissions from livestock.
Agriculture: improve fertilizer application, reduce N2O from soils.
Transport: non-electric vehicle efficiency (primary mode in Libya).
Transport: electrify light-duty road transport (conditional on grid decarbonization).
